nasb.text: Those who went in front and those who followed were shouting: “Hosanna! Blessed is He who comes in the name of the Lord;

esv.text: And those who went before and those who followed were shouting, “Hosanna! Blessed is he who comes in the name of the Lord!

cnv.text: 前行後隨的人都喊著說： “‘和散那’， 奉主名來的是應當稱頌的！

ccb.text: 大家前呼后拥，高声欢呼： “和散那！ 奉主名来的当受称颂！

csbs.text: 前行后随的人都呼喊： “和散那！ 奉主名而来的那一位——是蒙祝福的！
